top_signals.title: Pimco Favors Japan’s 30-Year Bonds, Says Yield Curve ‘Too Steep’
top_signals.summary: Pacific Investment Management Co. is seeing an opportunity in Japan’s 30-year sovereign bonds at a time when concerns over inflation and government spending have pushed those yields to record highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
